reviewRun.reviewPolicy: Apply maintainer decisions from the next-HITL priority reset. Remove the overfit skill workflow-option policy from the skill body and prioritize early decisions that materially reorder proof work.

claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: The maintainer agreed this is a concrete review-input behavior claim, not a human-only judgment. It should be proven by deterministic review-input tests.

claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: The maintainer agreed deterministic tests are sufficient. If doctor and agent status share the same runner-readiness assessment logic, one shared drift test can cover both surfaces.
